title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, delete models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client; sync & async APIs for chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, RAG).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models written in Rust.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation stack using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and module for reproducible Ollama installations on NixOS.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers inside CI pipelines for testing LLM apps.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer behavior and LiveView chat example.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection friendly interfaces.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack component to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for private or channel LLM queries.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes or selections via Ollama.

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package and SwiftUI example app for chatting with Ollama on macOS.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama with tokio and serde.
